parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id) as id,
  COALESCE(input1.slug, input2.slug) as slug,
  COALESCE(input1.name, input2.name) as name,
  input1.brand,
  input1.model,
  input1.category_id,
  input1.source_url,
  input1.description,
  input1.attributes,
  input1.content_fingerprint,
  input1.attributes_fingerprint,
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 'DELETE'
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN input1.content_fingerprint != input2.content_fingerprint OR
         input1.attributes_fingerprint != input2.attributes_fingerprint THEN 'UPDATE'
    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END as operation
FROM input1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 ON input1.id = input2.id
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN operation = 'DELETE' THEN 1
    WHEN operation = 'INSERT' THEN 2
    WHEN operation = 'UPDATE' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id);

SELECT
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id) as id,
  COALESCE(input1.canonical_product_id, input2.canonical_product_id) as canonical_product_id,
  COALESCE(input1.name, input2.name) as name,
  input1.description_text,
  input1.attributes,
  input1.content_fingerprint,
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 'DELETE'
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN input1.content_fingerprint != input2.content_fingerprint 
      AND COALESCE(input1.canonical_product_id, -1) = COALESCE(input2.canonical_product_id, -1) THEN 'UPDATE'
    WHEN COALESCE(input1.canonical_product_id, -1) != COALESCE(input2.canonical_product_id, -1) THEN 'UPDATE_CATEGORY'
    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END as operation
FROM input1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 ON input1.id = input2.id
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN operation = 'DELETE' THEN 1
    WHEN operation = 'INSERT' THEN 2
    WHEN operation = 'UPDATE' THEN 3
    WHEN operation = 'UPDATE_CATEGORY' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id);

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id) as id,
  COALESCE(input1.name, input2.name) as name,
  input1.slug as slug,
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 'DELETE'
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN input1.name != input2.name OR input1.slug != input2.slug THEN 'UPDATE'
    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END as operation
FROM input1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 ON input1.id = input2.id
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 1
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 2
    WHEN input1.name != input2.name THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id);

parameters.jsCode: return $('category operation').all();

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id) as id,
  COALESCE(input1.name, input2.name) as name,
  input1.taxonomy as taxonomy,
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 'DELETE'
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN input1.name != input2.name OR input1.taxonomy != input2.taxonomy  THEN 'UPDATE'
    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END as operation
FROM input1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 ON input1.id = input2.id
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 1
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 2
    WHEN input1.name != input2.name THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id);

parameters.jsCode: return $('attribute operation').all();

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i1.category_id,  i2.category_id)  AS category_id,
  COALESCE(i1.attribute_id, i2.attribute_id) AS attribute_id,
  CASE
    WHEN i1.category_id  IS NOT NULL AND i2.category_id  IS NOT NULL
     AND i1.attribute_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.attribute_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'NO_CHANGE'
    WHEN i1.category_id  IS NOT NULL AND i1.attribute_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i2.category_id  IS NULL     AND i2.attribute_id IS NULL     THEN 'INSERT'
    ELSE 'DELETE'
  END AS operation
FROM input1 i1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 i2
  ON  i1.category_id  = i2.category_id
  AND i1.attribute_id = i2.attribute_id
ORDER BY category_id, attribute_id;

parameters.jsCode: return $('attribute option operation').all();

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id) AS id,
  COALESCE(input1.name, input2.name) AS name,
  COALESCE(input1.slug, input2.slug) AS slug,
  COALESCE(input1.attribute_id, input2.attribute_id) AS attribute_id,

  CASE
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 'DELETE'

    WHEN
      input1.name <> input2.name
      OR input1.slug <> input2.slug
      OR input1.name IS NULL AND input2.name IS NOT NULL
      OR input1.name IS NOT NULL AND input2.name IS NULL
      OR input1.slug IS NULL AND input2.slug IS NOT NULL
      OR input1.slug IS NOT NULL AND input2.slug IS NULL
    THEN 'UPDATE'

    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END AS operation

FROM input1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2
  ON input1.id = input2.id

ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN input2.id IS NULL THEN 1 -- INSERT
    WHEN input1.id IS NULL THEN 2 -- DELETE
    WHEN
      input1.name <> input2.name
      OR input1.slug <> input2.slug
      OR input1.name IS NULL AND input2.name IS NOT NULL
      OR input1.name IS NOT NULL AND input2.name IS NULL
      OR input1.slug IS NULL AND input2.slug IS NOT NULL
      OR input1.slug IS NOT NULL AND input2.slug IS NULL
    THEN 3 -- UPDATE
    ELSE 4 -- NO_CHANGE
  END,
  COALESCE(input1.id, input2.id);

nodes.name: wait for products and attribute optoins

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i1.product_id,          i2.product_id)          AS product_id,
  COALESCE(i1.attribute_option_id, i2.attribute_option_id) AS attribute_option_id,
  CASE
    WHEN i1.product_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.product_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i1.attribute_option_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.attribute_option_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'NO_CHANGE'
    WHEN i1.product_id IS NOT NULL AND i1.attribute_option_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i2.product_id IS NULL    AND i2.attribute_option_id IS NULL               THEN 'INSERT'
    ELSE 'DELETE'
  END AS operation
FROM input1 i1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 i2
  ON  i1.product_id          = i2.product_id
  AND i1.attribute_option_id = i2.attribute_option_id
ORDER BY product_id, attribute_option_id;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i1.source_product_id, i2.source_product_id) AS source_product_id,
  COALESCE(i1.target_product_id, i2.target_product_id) AS target_product_id,
  CASE
    WHEN i1.source_product_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.source_product_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i1.target_product_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.target_product_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'NO_CHANGE'
    WHEN i1.source_product_id IS NOT NULL AND i1.target_product_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i2.source_product_id IS NULL     AND i2.target_product_id IS NULL     THEN 'INSERT'
    ELSE 'DELETE'
  END AS operation
FROM input1 i1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 i2
  ON  i1.source_product_id = i2.source_product_id
  AND i1.target_product_id = i2.target_product_id
ORDER BY source_product_id, target_product_id;

parameters.jsCode: return $('products specs operation').all();

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i1.product_id, i2.product_id) AS product_id,
  CASE
    WHEN i1.product_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.product_id IS NOT NULL
     AND i1.specs_fingerprint = i2.specs_fingerprint                              THEN 'NO_CHANGE'
    WHEN i1.product_id IS NOT NULL AND i2.product_id IS NOT NULL
     AND NOT (i1.specs_fingerprint = i2.specs_fingerprint
              OR (i1.specs_fingerprint IS NULL AND i2.specs_fingerprint IS NULL)) THEN 'UPDATE'
    WHEN i1.product_id IS NULL     AND i2.product_id IS NOT NULL                 THEN 'INSERT'
    ELSE                                                                               'DELETE'
  END AS operation,

  i1.specs,
  i1.table_specs,
  i1.variants,
  i1.compatibility,
  i1.specs_fingerprint,
  i1.specs_text,
  i1.features_text

FROM input1 i1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 i2
  ON i1.product_id = i2.product_id
ORDER BY product_id;

SELECT
  COALESCE(i1.source_key, i2.source_key)   AS source_key,

  COALESCE(i1.product_id, i2.product_id)   AS product_id,
  COALESCE(i1.software_id, i2.software_id) AS software_id,
  COALESCE(i1.chunk_type, i2.chunk_type)   AS chunk_type,
  COALESCE(i1.section_name, i2.section_name) AS section_name,

  CASE
    WHEN i1.source_key IS NULL    THEN 'DELETE'
    WHEN i2.id IS NULL            THEN 'INSERT'
    WHEN i1.content != i2.content THEN 'UPDATE'
    ELSE 'NO_CHANGE'
  END AS operation,

  i2.id AS id,

  i1.content,

  CASE
    WHEN i2.id IS NOT NULL AND i1.content != i2.content THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS content_changed

FROM input1 i1
FULL OUTER JOIN input2 i2
  ON i1.source_key = i2.source_key

WHERE i1.source_key IS NOT NULL
   OR i2.id IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN i1.source_key IS NULL    THEN 1
    WHEN i2.id IS NULL            THEN 2
    WHEN i1.content != i2.content THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  COALESCE(i1.source_key, i2.source_key);
